MODULE: cosmos.dns.ssl_certificates
FILE: cosmos/dns/ssl_certificates.py (439 lines)
CATEGORY: dns

DESCRIPTION: cosmos SSL Certificate Manager

"I've encrypted everything! Even my lab coat has a certificate!"

SSL/TLS certificate management with Let's Encrypt and monitoring.

CLASSES:
- CertificateStatus(Enum): Certificate status.
- Certificate: SSL certificate information.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- CertificateAlert: Certificate expiry alert.
- SSLManager: SSL/TLS certificate management for cosmos.

Features:
- Certificate inspection
-
  Methods: def get_certificate(self, domain: str, port: int=443, timeout: int=10) -> Optional[Certificate]
  Methods: def add_domain_to_monitor(self, domain: str, port: int=443) -> bool
  Methods: def remove_domain_from_monitor(self, domain: str) -> bool
  Methods: def check_all_certificates(self) -> List[CertificateAlert]
  Methods: def get_expiring_certificates(self, days: int=30) -> List[Certificate]
  Methods: async def request_certificate_certbot(self, domain: str, email: str, webroot: str=None, standalone: 
  Methods: async def renew_certificates_certbot(self, dry_run: bool=True) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def validate_certificate_chain(self, domain: str, port: int=443) -> Dict[str, Any]
